libraries.name: USGS Spectral Library (V7) Chapter M: Minerals
libraries.description: Mineral spectra measured with laboratory, field, and airborne spectrometers from the USGS Spectroscopy Lab.

libraries.name: USGS Spectral Library (V7) Chapter V: Vegetation
libraries.description: Vegetation spectra measured with laboratory, field, and airborne spectrometers from the USGS Spectroscopy Lab.

libraries.name: ECOSTRESS Spectral Library — Minerals
libraries.description: Laboratory mineral spectra from the JPL ECOSTRESS/ASTER spectral library (VSWIR and TIR), grouped by USGS mineral family.
